title: protocol Animal-Assisted Therapy
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5g6tu","text":"Human-animal interactions are considered as being valuable and beneficial for the psychological health. Recently Animal-Assisted Therapy (AAT) has been included for client-therapist interaction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Session oneIntroduction, briefing, primary assessing and introduction to the course
Session twoGiving an introduction about animals and their specific characteristics
Session threeTaking children to the place that animals were kept
Session fourSpending time in the place that animals were kept, talking about them and how to communicate with them
Session fiveConvincing children to come closer and touch and pet them
Session sixPlaying with animal and feeding them
Session sevenParticipation in activities like washing and feeding the animals
Session eightSummarizing, giving feedback, and post-test
creator: Mohammad Tahan
